signals.headline: Trump Nominates Kevin Warsh as Next Fed Chair | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Trump Nominates Kevin Warsh as Next Fed Chair | YES | HIGH confidence**  
President Donald Trump has nominated former Federal Reserve Governor **Kevin Warsh** to succeed Jerome Powell as Fed chair, as confirmed in recent announcements and analyses.[5][1][2]
